name: Heavenly Orange Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Cool completely.
3. In a bowl, soften the gelatin in orange juice and stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Combine the softened cream cheese and sugar in another bowl.
5. Gradually add the gelatin mixture to the cream cheese and sugar mixture.
6. Gently fold in the whipped cream and grated orange peel.
7. Chill the cheesecake until firm.
